meaning: n.(动植物) 化学分类学
examples: Chemotaxonomy: Method of biological classification based on similarities in the structure of certain compounds among the organisms being classified.
Wood extractives exhibit significant effects on wood properties and hence its utilization. They also play an important role on the chemotaxonomy of tree species.
The results in this thesis offer phytochemical proofs to plant chemotaxonomy and provide more chemical evidences for exploiting and utilizing the natural resources.
